finding: Two independent rigor upgrades each COLLAPSE clean-answer preservation: (1) separating the answer model (Claude) from the entailment judge (DeepSeek) on CURATED refs drives clean over-block from 5.9% (self-judged) to 70.6%; (2) replacing curated refs with REAL Wikipedia retrieval drives it to 64.7%. Contamination-caught stays high (97.7-100%). The original strong '5.9% over-block' was an artifact of the same model answering AND judging. The independent-verifier catches contamination but, under a truly independent judge or open-world refs, rejects most CLEAN answers too — the verification layer is too strict for real verbose answers (same root cause as the Cluster A verification gap).
